description: Style NoteCrafted from the softest fabric and styled with high fashion oomph, this pair of night dress from bw!tch contours your every curve and shapes you to give you an effortlessly curvy look. Now that's something worth investing in!Product DetailsSilver satin night dress with a V-neckline with embroidered lace at the neckline, below the neckline and at the hemline, bow detail at the centre and has thin and adjustable criss- cross shoulder strapsMaterial and CareLace, satinHand wash, drip dry in shadeDo not wring, iron, bleachWash dark colours separately
